# zeus_port (Data Source)

Lookup a Zeus port rule by ID

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "zeus" {
  endpoint = "http://localhost:8080"
  token    = "changeme"
}

data "zeus_port" "example" {
  id = "port-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Port rule ID

### Read-Only

- `assign_id` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `host` (String)
- `port` (Number)
- `service` (String)
- `target_port` (Number)
